name: purview-sentinel
notes: Sentinel integration lab for GCC. Mirror of commercial profile with GCC-specific Azure Government endpoints and feature availability caveats.
Azure resources deploy to Azure Government regions (e.g., usgovvirginia).
Defender portal availability in GCC is on a separate rollout schedule from commercial — validate before relying on it for this demo.
Microsoft Sentinel data lake tier availability in GCC may lag commercial.

sensitivityLabels.note: Single Confidential label for label-downgrade rule.

dlp.note: SSN SIT detection to generate SecurityAlert rows.

insiderRisk.note: GCC IRM feature rollout may differ from commercial. Validate SIEM export availability in your tenant.

auditConfig.note: Audit searches for DLP rule match correlation.

sentinelIntegration.note: Provisions Azure Government resources. Use Azure Government endpoints in az login (az cloud set --name AzureUSGovernment).

testData.note: Seed emails for DLP → Sentinel signal flow.
